function.name: filter-features-by-property
function.description: Filter the visible features on a layer based on property values. Only matching features will be displayed. Use reset=true to show all features again.

layerId.description: The ID of the layer to filter. Default is 'points-layer'.

property.description: The feature property to filter by (e.g., 'name', 'type', 'region'). Not required when reset=true.

value.description: The value to compare against. Not required when reset=true.

reset.description: Set to true to clear all filters and show all features. Default is false.
